result.summary: Found 2 issues: a critical accessibility problem with unreadable fine print, and a major layout issue with the content flow interruption.

issues.description: Fine print terms and conditions text is extremely small with poor contrast against the background, making it nearly impossible to read for most users
issues.suggestion: Increase font size to at least 11-12px, improve contrast ratio to meet WCAG AA standards (at least 4.5:1), and consider using a separate collapsible terms section instead of cramped fine print

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' button with checkmarks is visually positioned in the middle of content flow, creating a confusing interruption between the bonus offers section and the fine print
issues.suggestion: Relocate the scroll prompt to the bottom of the visible content area or remove it entirely if the page is already optimized for scrolling; alternatively, use a more subtle visual indicator
